label: base-character
prompt: A trendy, expressive 19-year-old East Asian woman, a Gen Z TikTok native who loves aesthetic tech. Long dark hair with subtle styling, clear youthful skin, light dewy natural makeup, bright curious eyes, a playful confident expression. Wearing a plain solid-colour casual top, no logos or graphics or prints. Extreme realism, detailed skin, realistic facial imperfections, natural daylight lighting, front-view close-up portrait looking directly at the camera, passport-style, only the close-up portrait.

label: base-character-v2
prompt: Re-render this exact same person as a hyper-realistic photograph. Keep the identical identity, face shape, hair, expression, wardrobe, framing and lighting, but give the skin super-detailed, true-to-life texture: visible pores, fine lines and subtle wrinkles, natural blemishes and freckles, slight redness and uneven skin tone, faint under-eye shadows, peach fuzz and a natural skin sheen. Do NOT airbrush, smooth, or beautify; the face must NOT look too perfect or plastic. Candid, unretouched DSLR close-up realism, natural daylight, passport-style portrait.
